nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联79种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等79种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cinereous-breasted spinetail
nodes.summary: Cinereous-breasted spinetail（Cinereous-breasted spinetail，学名 Synallaxis hypospodia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinereous-breasted spinetail (Synallaxis hypospodia) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One population is found in far eastern Peru's Department of Madre de Dios, northern and eastern Bolivia, and Brazil's western Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: One population is found in far eastern Peru's Department of Madre de Dios, northern and eastern Bolivia, and Brazil's western Amazon Basin

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There are also records at scattered locations throughout central Peru, but some of these are suspected to be misidentifications. The cinereous-breasted spinetail inhabits a variety of open landscapes including seasonally wet grassland, scrublands, campina, and savannah
